label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's break down the steps as if I'm actually doing them: 1. Take 7 steps: I'm now 7 steps away from my starting point. 2. Turn around: I'm now facing the opposite direction from where I came. 3. Turn around: I'm back to facing the original direction. 4. Turn around: I'm now facing the opposite direction from where I came again. 5. Take 1 step: I move 1 step in the opposite direction, so I'm 7 - 1 = 6 steps from the start. 6. Take 6 steps: I move 6 steps in the same direction, so I'm 6 - 6 = 0 steps from the start. So after following these instructions, I would indeed return to the starting point. Let me double-check: - Start at position 0 - After 7 steps: position 7 - After 1st turn around: facing left (if I'm imagining a number line) - After 2nd turn around: facing
